Subject: Where is my order?

Hi, my order was supposed to arrive three days ago, but I still have not received it. Can you tell me what is going on?

Subject: Late shipment update

Hello, my package has been delayed for almost a week and I have not gotten any shipping updates. Please let me know when I can expect it.

Subject: Damaged item

I received my blender today, but the glass container is cracked. I want to know what you can do about this.

Subject: Broken product on arrival

The lamp I ordered arrived today, but it does not turn on at all. I am very disappointed and need help with this issue.

Subject: Refund now

This is unacceptable. My order was late and I want a full refund immediately.

Subject: Requesting a refund

I would like to request a refund because the item I received does not match what I expected. Please let me know what the next step is.

Subject: Return policy question

Can I return an opened item if I only used it once?

Subject: Wrong item received

I ordered a blue backpack, but I received a black one instead. Please let me know how this can be fixed.

Subject: Terrible service

I have emailed twice already and nobody helped me. If this is not fixed soon, I am going to leave negative reviews everywhere.

Subject: Need help

I have a problem with my order. Please fix it.
